_doc: Image registry for automation/assets.mjs (Sqwod Verified product photos, EN+DE parity). TWO ways to fill each product: (1) MANUAL now — paste image URLs into `images` grabbed via Amazon SiteStripe (no API access needed); or (2) AUTO later — set `asin` and, once you have PA-API keys, the script pulls images from the Amazon Product Advertising API. Manual `images` always win when present. DTC products with no Amazon listing (e.g. Whoop, Eight Sleep): leave both empty → they keep the branded diamond placeholder. Editorial fields/scores are never touched.
